growth_records.agit: shaking (P uptake/release and batch experiments); orbital for R2A growth not specified
growth_records.medium: Modified mineral salts-vitamin (MSV) medium with glucose (P-cycling batch assay) / Aalborg West WWTP activated sludge batch
growth_records.cite: Fernando et al. Resolving the individual contribution of key microbial populations to enhanced biological phosphorus removal with Raman–FISH. The ISME Journal (2019). DOI:10.1038/s41396-019-0399-7. [PMC6776032]
growth_records.snippet: The cell-specific P-release rates were 0.14–0.25*10−13 g P cell−1 h−1 for Tetrasphaera and ~1.0 g P cell−1 h−1 for Ca. Accumulibacter.
growth_records.notes: Cell-specific ortho-P release rate under anaerobic conditions, calculated by the authors from FISH-Raman single-cell poly-P quantification during P-cycling experiments; paper states these were pooled from 'T. elongata pure cultures and activated sludge (from Aalborg West WWTP)' so the exact source system for this specific Tetrasphaera number is ambiguous. Pure-culture assay used MSV medium + 200 mg/L COD glucose (anaerobic, 3h) then aerobic phase with 0.32 mM Na2HPO4/0.18 mM NaH2PO4 (pH ~7.2); temperature not stated for this specific assay (parent T. elongata stock culture maintained at 26°C). [metadata completed from paper Methods: temperature]

growth_records.agit: shaking (P uptake/release and batch experiments); orbital for R2A growth not specified
growth_records.medium: Modified mineral salts-vitamin (MSV) medium (P-cycling batch assay) / Aalborg West WWTP activated sludge batch
growth_records.cite: Fernando et al. Resolving the individual contribution of key microbial populations to enhanced biological phosphorus removal with Raman–FISH. The ISME Journal (2019). DOI:10.1038/s41396-019-0399-7. [PMC6776032]
growth_records.snippet: The cell-specific P-uptake rate for Tetrasphaera was 0.22–0.38*10−13 and 1.49*10−13 g P cell−1 h−1 for Ca. Accumulibacter.
growth_records.notes: Cell-specific ortho-P uptake rate under aerobic conditions (0.5 mM phosphate provided, no carbon source, to maximize P-uptake), calculated by authors from FISH-Raman single-cell poly-P quantification; pooled across T. elongata pure culture and activated sludge P-cycling experiments per the text, so exact source system for this Tetrasphaera number is ambiguous. [metadata completed from paper Methods: temperature]
